Integrazione in un team impegnato e multiprofessionale in un'azienda con un alto livello di qualitГ  della vita e un elevato tenore di vita, team multiprofessionale in un ambiente stimolante in Engadina - descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione As part of this expansion in the area of inpatient pain therapy, we are looking for a medical co-head or a head physician as of fall 2026 or by arrangement. Together with you, we would like to further develop the future of integrative medicine and build up inpatient pain therapy. ## Mansioni - ÄMedical management and strategic further development of the Clinica Curativa in the field of integrative inpatient pain therapy - Clinical activity in your own specialty with responsibility for holistic patient care - Interdisciplinary cooperation with the medical, psychological, therapeutic and nursing teams - Promotion of training and further education Further education and training - Participation in the design of innovative projects ## Requisiti - Specialist with experience in the field of inpatient pain therapy ideally with specialization in interventional pain therapy SSIPM and/or certificate of competence SPS pain specialist and/or certificate of competence SAPPM or equivalent additional training - Specialist in general internal medicine with certificate of competence in complementary medical methods - Several years of management experience or willingness to take on management responsibility Commitment to evidence-based complementary medicine and interest in the multimodal, interdisciplinary treatment of chronic pain patients - Enthusiasm for an integrative, patient-centered treatment concept patient-centered treatment concept - Digital competence in dealing with an integrated HIS - Strong communication skills, team-oriented personality with innovative strength and creative drive ## Cosa offriamo - Responsible position (management position) with great creative freedom - Clearly structured working hours, high quality of life in a vacation region with a wide range of recreational and sports opportunities - Integration into a committed, multi-professional team in an inspiring environment in the Engadin - Excellent cooperation with the Ospidal and the other parts of the health center - Interdisciplinary working environment with short decision-making paths - Attractive employment conditions and support for further education and training - Opportunity to develop integrative concepts in pain medicine ## Contatto Under the umbrella of the "Center da sandГ  Engiadina Bassa" (CSEB) / "Health Center Lower Engadin", important regional providers in the areas of healthcare and wellness are joining forces. The services offered by the regional hospital, the rescue service, the rehabilitation clinic, Spitex, care groups, nursing homes and the Bogn Engiadina mineral baths are optimally coordinated. With this integrated care model, the CSEB has done pioneering work in the region and beyond. The Clinica Curativa combines conventional medical excellence with complementary medical expertise. Our integrative clinic stands for patient-centered and holistic treatment in the fields of complementary medicine, psychosomatics and oncology. It is in the process of establishing an innovative and integrative pain center that provides inpatient care for patients with acute and chronic pain in an interdisciplinary and multimodal setting. For further information, please contact the designated co-chief physician Dr. med. Cem Yetimoglu or the director of the health center Dr. med. Joachim Koppenberg. You can reach us on +41 81 861 13 00. We look forward to receiving your online application.

descriptionByLocale.en: For the operating department at Ospidal Scuol, we are looking for a motivated individual starting from June 1, 2026, or by mutual agreement. ## Main duties - Our key areas of focus include traumatology, orthopedics with endoprosthetics, gynecology, and visceral surgery. - We also offer gastroenterology, pneumology with corresponding endoscopic examinations, and pain therapy interventions. - Key responsibilities: - Instrumenting and assisting during surgeries - Ensuring nursing care and support for patients during their stay in the operating department - Instrument preparation and sterilization in the AEMP - Assisting with medical endoscopies ## Requirements - Certified nursing diploma or technical surgical staff diploma, or equivalent experience as an operating room specialist - Responsible and independent work ethic - Proficiency in German (written and spoken) and familiarity with common IT applications - Teamwork skills, initiative, and flexibility - Openness to new ideas and commitment to change - Willingness to work on-call and weekends - Completed training as a technical sterilization assistant is an advantage ## What we offer - Exciting and varied work - Modern infrastructure - Competitive employment conditions - Comprehensive professional training - Internal and external further education opportunities ## Contact Under the umbrella of В«Center da sanadad Engiadina BassaВ» (CSEB) / В«Health Center Lower EngadineВ», important regional providers in healthcare and wellness are joining forces. In the National Park region, you will find a wonderful environment with diverse recreational and sports opportunities. Ospidal Lower Engadine is a regional hospital responsible for basic and emergency medical care in the region. It offers cutting-edge conventional and complementary medicine and is a pioneer in Switzerland in patient safety. The hospital provides services in surgery, traumatology, orthopedics, gynecology and obstetrics, internal medicine and palliative care, integrative medicine, anesthesiology and pain therapy, including an IMC unit. The hospital features state-of-the-art infrastructure with KIS, RIS, PACS, including numerous advanced telemedicine solutions, as well as a modern operating theater with 2 ORs. For further information, please contact Karsten Gulke, Head of OR Nursing, at +41 81 861 12 49. We look forward to receiving your online application.
